title: Financial Management Division
subtitle: Processing and verification of trust fund releases under statutory disaster relief initiatives.

serviceDetails.name: Review Application for Trust Fund – Emergency Loan Assistance Program (ELAP)
serviceDetails.purpose: Processing of employee applications to avail of the Trust Fund – Emergency Loan Assistance Program (ELAP).

requirements: Doctor's Prescription / Official Receipt / Statement of Account
Payslip not below Php 3,000 after ELAP deduction
